code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> STARTUP

    STARTUP --> POSITION_RECOVERY: Initialize Agent

    state POSITION_RECOVERY {Education_StudentDB] --> QueryPlatform
        QueryPlatform --> ExtractPositions: get_portfolio_breakdown
        ExtractPositions --> GenerateSyntheticDecisions: Found N positions
        GenerateSyntheticDecisions --> RebuildMemory: Create decision records
        RebuildMemory --> AssociateMonitor: Populate PortfolioMemoryEngine
        AssociateMonitor --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Mark startup_complete

        QueryPlatform --> RetryBackoff: Failure
        RetryBackoff --> QueryPlatform: Exponential delay
        QueryPlatform --> ForceComplete: Max retries
        ForceComplete --> [Education_StudentDB]: Continue with empty state
    }

    POSITION_RECOVERY --> IDLE: Recovery Complete

    state IDLE {Education_GradeSync] --> WaitInterval
        WaitInterval --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: After analysis_frequency_seconds
    }

    IDLE --> LEARNING: Timer Expires

    state LEARNING {Education_ClassroomService] --> FetchClosedTrades
        FetchClosedTrades --> ProcessOutcomes: get_closed_trades
        ProcessOutcomes --> RecordMemory: PortfolioMemoryEngine
        RecordMemory --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Update experience
    }

    LEARNING --> PERCEPTION

    state PERCEPTION {Education_StudentDB] --> FetchPortfolio
        FetchPortfolio --> KillSwitchCheck: get_portfolio_breakdown
        KillSwitchCheck --> DailyReset: P&L within limits
        DailyReset --> [Education_GradeSync]: Reset trade count

        KillSwitchCheck --> HALT: P&L breached
    }

    PERCEPTION --> REASONING

    state REASONING {Education_LMS_Portal] --> LoopAssets
        LoopAssets --> AnalyzeAsset: For each asset
        AnalyzeAsset --> RetryLogic: generate_decision
        RetryLogic --> CheckAction: Success
        CheckAction --> NextAsset: HOLD
        CheckAction --> [Education_ClassroomService]: BUY/SELL

        RetryLogic --> ExponentialBackoff: Failure
        ExponentialBackoff --> AnalyzeAsset: Retry
        ExponentialBackoff --> MarkFailure: Max retries
        MarkFailure --> NextAsset: Skip

        NextAsset --> LoopAssets: More assets
        NextAsset --> [Education_StudentDB]: All processed
    }

    REASONING --> RISK_CHECK: Actionable
    REASONING --> IDLE: No Action

    state RISK_CHECK {Education_StudentDB] --> GetMonitoringContext
        GetMonitoringContext --> ValidateTrade: RiskGatekeeper
        ValidateTrade --> [Education_StudentDB]: Approved
        ValidateTrade --> [Education_StudentDB]: Denied
    }

    RISK_CHECK --> EXECUTION: Approved
    RISK_CHECK --> PERCEPTION: Rejected

    state EXECUTION {Education_LMS_Portal] --> SendOrder
        SendOrder --> AssociateDecision: execute_trade
        AssociateDecision --> IncrementCounter: TradeMonitor
        IncrementCounter --> [Education_ContentCDN]: daily_trade_count++

        SendOrder --> LogFailure: Error
        LogFailure --> EXECUTION_FAILED
    }

    EXECUTION --> LEARNING: Executed
    EXECUTION_FAILED --> PERCEPTION: Retry

    state HALT {Education_LMS_Portal] --> StopAgent
        StopAgent --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: is_running = False
    }

    HALT --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Agent Stopped

    style STARTUP fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style POSITION_RECOVERY fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style IDLE fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#424242,color:#fff
    style LEARNING fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style PERCEPTION fill:#2196F3,stroke:#0D47A1,color:#fff
    style REASONING fill:#FF9800,stroke:#E65100,color:#fff
    style RISK_CHECK fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
    style EXECUTION fill:#9C27B0,stroke:#4A148C,color:#fff
    style HALT fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style EXECUTION_FAILED fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个智能教育资产代理的状态机，核心是从Education_GradeSync启动，经过POSITION_RECOVERY恢复持仓状态，然后进入IDLE等待周期。你觉得这个主流程合理吗？
明白了，POSITION_RECOVERY内部需要连接Education_StudentDB查询平台数据对吧？我看到有QueryPlatform到ExtractPositions的转换，失败时还要有RetryBackoff机制。
对，重试用指数退避，最大重试次数后走ForceComplete，以空状态继续。恢复完成后标记startup_complete到Education_LMS_Portal，然后进入IDLE。
好的，我先把POSITION_RECOVERY的复合状态画出来，包括GenerateSyntheticDecisions生成决策、RebuildMemory重建记忆、AssociateMonitor关联监控这些内部流转。
IDLE状态之后，定时器触发进入LEARNING阶段。这里要从Education_ClassroomService获取已关闭交易，处理结果后更新到PortfolioMemoryEngine。
LEARNING到PERCEPTION的转换是自动的吗？还有PERCEPTION里的KillSwitchCheck，是检查P&L是否超限？
是的，KillSwitchCheck如果P&L在限制内就走DailyReset，重置Education_GradeSync的交易日计数；如果超限直接HALT停机。
PERCEPTION部分我加上了FetchPortfolio从Education_StudentDB获取数据。接下来REASONING阶段需要遍历资产做决策分析。
REASONING是核心，从Education_LMS_Portal进入LoopAssets循环，对每个资产AnalyzeAsset生成决策。成功的话CheckAction判断是HOLD还是发交易指令给Education_ClassroomService。
决策生成失败要有RetryLogic对吧？我设计了ExponentialBackoff回退到AnalyzeAsset重试，最大次数后MarkFailure跳过当前资产。
没错，所有资产处理完回到Education_StudentDB。REASONING之后如果有可执行动作就进RISK_CHECK，否则回IDLE。
RISK_CHECK我画成从Education_StudentDB获取监控上下文，用RiskGatekeeper验证交易，通过就EXECUTION，拒绝就回PERCEPTION重新感知。
EXECUTION从Education_LMS_Portal发送订单，AssociateDecision记录决策执行，IncrementCounter更新TradeMonitor，然后Education_ContentCDN的daily_trade_count自增。
执行失败呢？需要EXECUTION_FAILED状态吗？
对，SendOrder出错走LogFailure到EXECUTION_FAILED，然后回PERCEPTION重试。执行成功则进LEARNING更新经验。
HALT状态我设计成从Education_LMS_Portal停止代理，设置is_running为False，最终标记Agent Stopped。
最后加上视觉区分：STARTUP和POSITION_RECOVERY用青色，IDLE灰色，LEARNING绿色，PERCEPTION蓝色，REASONING橙色，RISK_CHECK黄色，EXECUTION紫色，HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED红色。
颜色方案已应用。我核对一下：REASONING的LoopAssets到NextAsset的循环，以及所有Education系统的连接都正确吗？
等等，IDLE里的WaitInterval转换条件应该是After analysis_frequency_seconds，不是固定的。还有PERCEPTION里的DailyReset，目标是Education_GradeSync，不是LMS_Portal。
已修正。DailyReset现在正确指向Education_GradeSync，IDLE的触发条件也改成了analysis_frequency_seconds。整个状态机应该完整了。
